evaluators.name: Weeknight Dinners Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved at least 3 qualifying quick, low-calorie dinner recipes that serve 4 into a 'Weeknight Dinners' collection.

evaluators.name: Rainy Day Plan Activities Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added 5 free indoor activities for ages 5–8 lasting no more than 60 minutes to a 'Rainy Day Plan' list.

evaluators.name: Family Mindfulness Article Bookmark Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user bookmarked at least one qualifying beginner-level wellbeing article about a family mindfulness routine (10–15 minutes, 10+ comments, published within 2 years) to any reading list.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Family Yoga Mat to Home Gym Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user filtered correctly for family yoga mats under $60 with rating ≥4.5, compared two qualifying options, and added the cheapest one to a 'Home Gym' product list.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Preferences Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user set newsletter preferences to weekly on Monday at 8:00 AM for exactly the three topics Healthy Recipes, Parenting Tips, and Mindfulness & Self-Care, sent to family_tester@example.com.

evaluators.name: Screen Time Comment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user posted a qualifying comment by 'Jordan' on a recent parenting article about screen time rules for ages 9–12, with exactly two sentences including the phrase 'family agreement'.

evaluators.name: Weekend Fun Planner Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'Weekend Fun' planner plan that includes 2 qualifying outdoor activities for ages 3–6 on Saturday and 2 qualifying healthy snack recipes on Sunday.

evaluators.name: Wellness Budget Planner Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a monthly wellness budget of $200 for the upcoming month with allocations of $80 for Healthy Groceries, $70 for Family Activities, and $50 for Subscriptions.
